title: 4 women killed in West Bank are first Palestinian deaths in Iran war
summary_full: They were at a salon getting their nails done for Eid al-Fitr. It was unclear who fired the missile.
summary_public: They were at a salon getting their nails done for Eid al-Fitr. It was unclear who fired the missile.
